AN EF0 TORNADO WITH A PATH LENGTH OF JUST UNDER A MILE AND A PATH WIDTH OF 40 YARDS BEGAN AT INDIAN PAINTBRUSH DRIVE AND ENDED AT THE BRAZOS MALL IN LAKE JACKSON. THE TORNADO TRACKED FROM A RESIDENTIAL NEIGHBORHOOD SOUTHWEST OF THE MALL AND KNOCKED DOWN FENCES AND SHALLOW ROOTED TREES. THE TORNADO TRACKED INTO THE EASTERN END OF THE MALL WHERE IT CAUSED ROOF DAMAGE. A MALL SECURITY GUARD REPORTED SEEING A SMALL TORNADO.
